meaning: n.巴斯克人[语],一种妇人用短上衣adj.巴斯克人的
examples: Spanish police say they have arrested ten people suspected of being members of the Basque separatist movement.
In fact, 80% of Spain's machine tools are from the Basque Country.
The mise-en-scène chosen by the leaders of ETA, the armed Basque separatist group, for their video declaration yesterday was very familiar.
Over the weekend two Spanish regions, Galicia and the Basque country, are set to hold elections.
The attack happened less than three weeks before regional elections in the Basque Country.
